sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18287" key="a)fhniasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφηνῐ-αστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n18287.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">refusing the reins,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἵππος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:114" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">114</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rebellious,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:337" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">337</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
